code:
import io
import string

let input = "#{io.read_to_end()} "
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut evens_empty = true
mut odds_empty = true
mut current = ""
mut i = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            if evens_empty
              evens = current
              evens_empty = false
            else
              evens = "#{evens} #{current}"
            end
          else
            if odds_empty
              odds = current
              odds_empty = false
            else
              odds = "#{odds} #{current}"
            end
          end
        when None
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
